original_title: NTTR-050 Weekly Young Nottri Gravure Photographer Rolling Koike's Amazing Shooting Method "I possess it and go inside and become the subject myself." Erina Oka - Erina Hill
overview: I'm a fledgling cameraman who wants to be a famous cameraman after getting rid of sala. People like me are overwhelmingly charismatic because they bring out a really attractive smile from the girl who is the subject of "Rolling Koike". I longed for him so much that I decided to become his disciple. But he was pulling out the girl's smile in a ridiculous way. He himself had been inside her ... in other words, he was possessed ... [* This work is an image video]
